product_overview: MedEduAI is an AI-powered medical education platform offering student dashboards, AI-assisted study tools, mentorship, and exam preparation modules to support learners and educators. The product centralizes authentication, personalized learning content, and AI-driven assistants in a single web interface.
core_goals: Provide secure authentication and role-based access for students and faculty
Deliver an AI-assisted learning experience (notes, Q&A, concept explanations)
Support mentorship and peer matching workflows
Offer exam preparation tools including viva simulation and vocabulary practice
Give a centralized dashboard for quick access to modules and user progress

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow users to authenticate with email and password to access protected areas of the site.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Be redirected to /dashboard -> See dashboard content
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with invalid email or wrong password -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Allow new users to register an account and start a session.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign up button -> Be redirected to /dashboard -> See welcome message
Navigate to /signup -> Fill email input field with existing email -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign up button -> See error message indicating account already exists

features.name: Student Dashboard Access
features.description: Provide authenticated users a central dashboard with quick access to learning modules and profile/activity tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See sidebar with module links (LMS Notes, Mentorship MS, AI Mentor, Viva Simulator, Vocabulary, Reflection Generator) -> Click a module link -> Open selected module view
Navigate to /dashboard while not authenticated -> See redirect to /login or access denied message -> Click Login and authenticate

features.name: LMS Notes (AI-assisted learning notes)
features.description: Enable users to generate, search, and view structured AI-assisted notes for subjects and topics.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'LMS Notes' -> Enter search query or select subject -> Click Generate notes -> See generated notes in viewer
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'LMS Notes' -> Enter unsupported or empty query -> Click Generate notes -> See validation error or 'no results' message

features.name: Mentorship Portal
features.description: Allow users to view mentorship profiles, request mentorship, and participate in peer matching.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'Mentorship MS' -> Browse mentor profiles -> Click Request mentorship -> See confirmation of request
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'Mentorship MS' -> Attempt to request mentorship without completing profile -> See error prompting to complete profile

features.name: AI Mentor (Q&A and concept explanations)
features.description: Provide an AI assistant for answering medical questions, explaining concepts, and supporting case discussion.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'AI Mentor' -> Enter clinical question in input -> Click Submit/Ask -> See AI-generated answer
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'AI Mentor' -> Enter question containing prohibited content -> Click Submit/Ask -> See moderation error or content rejection message

features.name: Viva Simulator
features.description: Simulate oral exam scenarios with AI-generated viva questions and provide feedback scoring.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'Viva Simulator' -> Select subject and difficulty -> Click Start simulation -> See sequence of AI-generated viva questions
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'Viva Simulator' -> Start simulation with unsupported subject -> See error or prompt to choose supported subject

features.name: Vocabulary Builder
features.description: Train users on medical terminology through quiz-based practice and spaced repetition lists.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'Vocabulary' -> Select quiz or practice set -> Click Start quiz -> See first question and answer options
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'Vocabulary' -> Attempt to start quiz with no saved progress -> See prompt to import or select a vocabulary list

features.name: Reflection Generator
features.description: Assist users in writing structured clinical reflections using AI guidance and templates.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'Reflection Generator' -> Select reflection template -> Enter brief case notes -> Click Generate reflection -> See AI-generated structured reflection
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click sidebar item 'Reflection Generator' -> Submit empty case notes -> Click Generate reflection -> See validation error requesting more detail

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
